topic: area of composite figures, percent of area, and rate problems
latex:
A backyard that is 20 yards wide and 30 yards long contains a semicircle-shaped garden with a diameter of 6 yards. The rest of the yard is grass.

\textbf{a.} Find the percent of the yard that is grass.

\textbf{b.} If you mow the grass at a rate of 28 square yards per minute, how long (in minutes) does it take you to mow the grass?
